metadata.description: Get Design Done — 5-stage agent-orchestrated design pipeline with Figma + Refero connections, knowledge layer (intel store, dependency analysis, learnings extraction), and standalone audit commands.

plugins.name: get-design-done
plugins.description: Agent-orchestrated design pipeline: Scan → Discover → Plan → Design → Verify. 17+ specialized agents, Figma + Refero MCP connections, style/darkmode/compare/analyze-dependencies/skill-manifest/extract-learnings commands. Knowledge layer: .design/intel/ store, dependency graph, learnings extraction.
